subcodes.first_line: O thou offshoot of the branch of divinity! Thy numerous letters addressed to the honored Manshadí have been considered. The news of the completion of the sacred House
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاخ شاخسار روحانی مکاتیب متعدده که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نمودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
